goal_text: 继续把 Agent Studio 提升到 98%
current_state: Agent Studio has event-first task writes, guarded parallel 2 execution, Resident Observer, Goal Engine, Planner Agent, Agent Registry, Self-Repair, and Finalize.
target_state: Natural-language goals can produce reviewed planner output, READY queue tasks, event-store task.created records, and an agent-cycle dry-run without manual queue assembly.

capability_scores.name: Goal to Queue Loop
evidence: Goal Engine, Planner, Registry schemas exist
Event Store and agent-cycle dry-run exist
capability_scores.gap_summary: Need executable goal-to-queue bridge from goal text to task.created events and READY queue tasks.

capability_scores.name: Approval-gated Autonomous Loop
evidence: Resident Observer can summarize recurring failures
capability_scores.gap_summary: Need dry-run autonomous-loop that chains goal-to-queue, observe, agent-cycle plan, and doctor.

gaps.summary: Natural-language goals are not yet materialized as READY queue tasks.
gaps.impact: The platform still needs a manual bridge from goal planning to agent-cycle.

gaps.summary: Generated planner output needs a validation matrix before execution.
gaps.impact: Generated tasks could be malformed or assigned to the wrong lane without checks.

milestones.title: Goal to queue dry-run is reviewable
exit_criteria: task candidates include owners, risks, expected files, and validation commands

milestones.title: Goal to queue apply writes event-first tasks
exit_criteria: queue read model has READY tasks

recommended_tasks.title: Agent Studio V3 user workflow docs

risks.summary: Generated tasks could overreach into business or production paths.
risks.mitigation: Default forbidden paths block apps, packages, database, infra, CI, Docker, deploy, auth, and production operations.
